title: iberis spathulata subsp. gastonis
intro: Iberis spathulata subsp. gastonis, also known as the Iberis plant, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Iberis spathulata subsp. gastonis may be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
